item.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
item.description: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.

item.title: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim
item.description: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.

item.title: Trump administration reclassifies cannabis as less dangerous
item.description: Medical marijuana was moved into a lower category of drugs in order to increase research and access.

item.title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
item.description: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.

item.title: Pope Leo criticises Equatorial Guinea prisons as he winds up Africa tour
item.description: The Pope gives a frank and passionate speech, the likes of which have characterised his tour of Africa.
